headline: HPE Delivers Unified Agentic IT Operations With GreenLake and HPE Morpheus Software
summary: LAS VEGAS, June 17, 2026--HPE Discover Las Vegas 2026 – HPE (NYSE: HPE) today announced expanded capabilities across GreenLake to deliver unified operations for the agentic enterprise through innovations across agentic AIOps, private cloud, and software for AI infrastructure. Through GreenLake, HPE provides customers with a unified operating model that addresses rising virtualization costs, modernizes for emerging AI workloads, and simplifies operational complexity.

headline: The Hackett Group® Partners with ServiceNow to Help Enterprises Accelerate ROI-based AI Transformation
summary: MIAMI, June 17, 2026--The Hackett Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: HCKT), an ROI-led AI transformation firm, today announced it has joined the ServiceNow Partner Program as a Consulting and Implementation partner to help organizations identify high-value AI opportunities and accelerate workflow transformation with Hackett AI XPLR™ and the ServiceNow AI Platform. headline: Nasdaq Futures Climb as Chip Stocks Rebound Ahead of First Fed Decision Under Warsh
summary: June Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQM26) are up +0.54% this morning, signaling a rebound from yesterday’s selloff, while investors await the first Federal Reserve rate decision under Kevin Warsh.
